# Issue #1: Setup project structure

## Description
Set up the foundational project structure for the 3D Printer Production Simulator.

- [x] Create project directory structure
- [x] Add pyproject.toml with dependencies

## Acceptance Criteria

- All dependencies installable
- Directory structure matches PRD specification
